title: Real-data suite is conditionally skipped when data/kaggle is absent
evidence: tests/test_real_data.py:24-27 pytest.mark.skipif(not DATA_DIR.exists()). Guard did NOT fire this run — all 6 CSVs present in data/kaggle, so the 6 tests executed (test_coverage=0.97).
suggestion: Acceptable guard; keep for portability. No action needed while data is present.

title: Lint/quality score below ceiling
evidence: scores.json code_quality=0.667 (scorer-computed). Specific warnings not re-extractable — ruff is not installed in the run's .venv.
suggestion: Run ruff/lint locally to surface and clear the remaining quality warnings.

title: Query surface exceeds the minimal spec
evidence: knowledge_base.py adds home_away venue filter (team_record/find_matches), min_overall + position player filters, and stats beyond avg goals (away_win_rate, draw_rate, biggest_wins in competition_stats:277-286).
suggestion: None — enhancements beyond spec, noted for cross-run comparison.
